infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: hone needs camera access to record your daily practice clips
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: hone needs microphone access to capture audio in your practice clips
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: hone needs photo library access to save your reveal videos
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: hone needs permission to save your reveal videos to your camera roll
